TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Himoti = Gaga mniq Taytung Kwansancn ka alang Himoti. 230 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 635 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 66% niqan 421 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 34% niqan 214 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis63%, Puyuma2%, ni rahuq na o2%. Thiyan alang Hangan nniqan Himoti hini sbiyaw o Rey-kung-hwo, thnganan dha nanaq seejiq o Kaadaadaan msa. Qnbhangan kari seuxal o saw bi tnthnganan klgan seejiq Pinuyumayan kisa, ini hari kla na dungus bi. Lutuc snruwan kari sbiyaw o niqan kingal nanaq puniq hmru hini keeman, eniq hini Ri-jun na seejiq o skluuy balay, iyux dha kingal nanaq na tqliwaq, kari klmukan ka tqliwaq nii o Rey-kung msa, kika tmhangan dha Rey-kung-hwo ka alang nii. Nniqan alang Nyusan Taytung Kwan-san ceng alang Himoti. Klbangan Gaga mniq Hwa-tung cung-ku na nan-twan ka Kwan-san ceng, hraan hidaw o sgasuc dha siyaw dgiyaq gsilung ni nsgan Tung-he, daya o lutuc nsgan C-san, gqiyan hidaw o dalih dhiyaq cung-yang na nsgan Hay-twan, hunac o kika nsgan Ru-yey kiya, thyaqan dha paru alang Taytung o saw hari 42km. Mniq hunac Pey-hwey-kwey-siyeyn, Je-tay-ci-fung ka karac, 24‚ĄÉ hari ka kngkwasan. Srnabaw o 23.6‚ĄÉ, rbagan o 37.5‚ĄÉ, krpuhan o 24.6‚ĄÉ, misan o 19.4‚ĄÉ, kingal idas siida o 18.9‚ĄÉ, empitu idas siida o 27.8‚ĄÉ, kingal hngkwasan o ini hari lglug ka un-tu karac dha, ini hari slexan ka S-ci dha uri. Kndkilan lnglingay Dowras. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung ‚óéPgriq rulu: Muda Tay9 siyeyn quri hunac>muda Kwan-san-ceng kung-swo pgriq igi>Hakaw paru Teyeyn-kwang>seng-taw 197siyeyn>Hakaw 17 >alang Himoti. Tnealang seejiq Seejiq Amis. Skari Kari Amis, Tlu ni kari Nihung. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Teyeyn-cu-cyaw, Taw-cyaw. Pnyahan alang ‚óéAlang Himoti na tnhjilan tnsapah na snslian kingal alang. Alang Himotin na Seejiq Amis o pusu bi "Hen-cun na Amis", lnglung ka nseejiq alang Himoti o nniqan Arapanay(gaga hunac yayung C-pen sayang) o kika pusu bi hruan Seejiq Amis kisa, bukuy do seasug kngkingal tnsapah siida kika tnhjil. Himoti na seejiq Amis o yasa ini knmalu ka eseisil seejiq, kiya ni lutuc thjil Hen-cun, hici do yasa niqan Klmukan tnhjilan ruwan Hen-cun duri, kiya ni ini kbaka ka na ka dxgal qnpahan dha, kiya ni knkingal tnsapah o miying ini ktna ka elug thjil dungan, dhuq sayang na alang Himoti. Niqan maspac tnsapah ka Himoti sayang: Ciwidian,Malulang,Pacidal,Pawtawan,Rarangs,Kakupa,Tarisakan,Sakayangay. Mniq saw Himoti na kngkingal sapah Amis hini o niqan kingal snluan qhuni Men-pay kana, matas hangan tnsapah, hangan kari Amis qbsuran sapah ni kari Tlu na qbsuran sapah, kika klaun dha balay. . ‚óé Paru ndaan alang Himoti: ‚Äß 1807ŚĻīRangawŚíĆFangas Kaadaadaan. ‚Äß 1850ŚĻīťõĽŚÖČśąźÁęčŚĻīťĹ°ÁĶĄÁĻĒKaput. ‚Äß 1866 . ‚ÄßHngkwasan 2002ŚĻīťõĽŚÖČ3ŤôüŚ†§ťė≤śĒĻŚĖĄ. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pusu pnhyugan: ‚óéCiway sapah pyasan Teyeyn-kwang 089-951142 Nyusan Tay-tung Kwan-san-ceng Teyen-kwang-ri Cung-sing 93. Nniqan saan rmigaw ‚óéDgiyaq Cun-cyeyn (Tamina) ‚óéElug fung-siyun-taw ‚óéTu-row khilang ‚óéSan-ca-san ci-neyeyn-pey ‚óéťõĽŚÖČŚúčŚįŹŚéüÁĒüś§ćÁČ©Śúí ‚óéTeyeyn-kwang hwo-tung-cung-sing
S.PHON: = ńßimoti = gaga mniq tajtuŇč kwansan ¶n ka alaŇč ńßimoti. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, pujuma*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. tńßijan alaŇč ńßaŇčan nniqan ńßimoti ńßini sbijaw o …ĺ…ô-kuŇč-ńßwo, tńßŇčanan dńßa nanaq s…ô…ô…üiq o kaadaadaan msa. qnbńßaŇčan ka…ĺi s…ôuxal o saw bi tntńßŇčanan klgan s…ô…ô…üiq pinujumajan kisa, ini ńßa…ĺi kla na duŇčus bi. lutu ¶ sn…ĺuwan ka…ĺi sbijaw o niqan kiŇčal nanaq puniq ńßm…ĺu ńßini k…ô…ôman, …ôniq ńßini …ĺi-…üun na s…ô…ô…üiq o skluuj balaj, ijux dńßa kiŇčal nanaq na tqliwaq, ka…ĺi klmukan ka tqliwaq nii o …ĺ…ô-kuŇč msa, kika tmńßaŇčan dńßa …ĺ…ô-kuŇč-ńßwo ka alaŇč nii. nniqan alaŇč njusan tajtuŇč kwan-san ¶…ôŇč alaŇč ńßimoti. klbaŇčan gaga mniq ńßwa-tuŇč ¶uŇč-ku na nan-twan ka kwan-san ¶…ôŇč, ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o sgasu ¶ dńßa sijaw dgijaq gsiluŇč ni nsgan tuŇč-ńß…ô, daja o lutu ¶ nsgan ¶-san, gqijan ńßidaw o dalińß dńßijaq ¶uŇč-jaŇč na nsgan ńßaj-twan, ńßuna ¶ o kika nsgan …ĺu-j…ô kija, tńßjaqan dńßa pa…ĺu alaŇč tajtuŇč o saw ńßa…ĺi **km. mniq ńßuna ¶ p…ô-ńßw…ô-kw…ô-sij…ôn, …ü…ô-taj- ¶i-*uŇč ka ka…ĺa ¶, *** ńßa…ĺi ka kŇčkwasan. s…ĺnabaw o **.**, …ĺbagan o **.**, k…ĺpuńßan o **.**, misan o **.**, kiŇčal idas siida o **.**, …ômpitu idas siida o **.**, kiŇčal ńßŇčkwasan o ini ńßa…ĺi lglug ka un-tu ka…ĺa ¶ dńßa, ini ńßa…ĺi sl…ôxan ka s- ¶i dńßa u…ĺi. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj dow…ĺas. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč *pg…ĺiq …ĺulu: muda taj* sij…ôn qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶>muda kwan-san- ¶…ôŇč kuŇč-swo pg…ĺiq igi>ńßakaw pa…ĺu t…ô…ôn-kwaŇč>s…ôŇč-taw ***sij…ôn>ńßakaw ** >alaŇč ńßimoti. tn…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq s…ô…ô…üiq amis. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi amis, tlu ni ka…ĺi nińßuŇč. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw t…ô…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw, taw- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč *alaŇč ńßimoti na tnńß…üilan tnsapańß na snslian kiŇčal alaŇč. alaŇč ńßimotin na s…ô…ô…üiq amis o pusu bi "ńß…ôn- ¶un na amis", lŇčluŇč ka ns…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč ńßimoti o nniqan a…ĺapanaj(gaga ńßuna ¶ jajuŇč ¶-p…ôn sajaŇč) o kika pusu bi ńß…ĺuan s…ô…ô…üiq amis kisa, bukuj do s…ôasug kŇčkiŇčal tnsapańß siida kika tnńß…üil. ńßimoti na s…ô…ô…üiq amis o jasa ini knmalu ka …ôs…ôisil s…ô…ô…üiq, kija ni lutu ¶ tńß…üil ńß…ôn- ¶un, ńßi ¶i do jasa niqan klmukan tnńß…üilan …ĺuwan ńß…ôn- ¶un du…ĺi, kija ni ini kbaka ka na ka dxgal qnpańßan dńßa, kija ni knkiŇčal tnsapańß o mijiŇč ini ktna ka …ôlug tńß…üil duŇčan, dńßuq sajaŇč na alaŇč ńßimoti. niqan maspa ¶ tnsapańß ka ńßimoti sajaŇč: ¶iwidian,malulaŇč,pa ¶idal,pawtawan,…ĺa…ĺaŇčs,kakupa,ta…ĺisakan,sakajaŇčaj. mniq saw ńßimoti na kŇčkiŇčal sapańß amis ńßini o niqan kiŇčal snluan qńßuni m…ôn-paj kana, matas ńßaŇčan tnsapańß, ńßaŇčan ka…ĺi amis qbsu…ĺan sapańß ni ka…ĺi tlu na qbsu…ĺan sapańß, kika klaun dńßa balaj. . * pa…ĺu ndaan alaŇč ńßimoti: * *****…ĺaŇčaw**aŇčas kaadaadaan. * *************kaput. * **** . *ńßŇčkwasan *************. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw pusu pnńßjugan: * ¶iwaj sapańß pjasan t…ô…ôn-kwaŇč ***-****** njusan taj-tuŇč kwan-san- ¶…ôŇč t…ô…ôn-kwaŇč-…ĺi ¶uŇč-siŇč **. nniqan saan …ĺmigaw *dgijaq ¶un- ¶j…ôn (tamina) *…ôlug *uŇč-sijun-taw *tu-…ĺow kńßilaŇč *san- ¶a-san ¶i-n…ô…ôn-p…ô ********** *t…ô…ôn-kwaŇč ńßwo-tuŇč- ¶uŇč-siŇč
S.FORM: = Himoti = Gaga mniq Taytung Kwansancn ka alang Himoti. 230 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 635 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 66% niqan 421 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 34% niqan 214 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis63%, Puyuma2%, ni rahuq na o2%. Thiyan alang Hangan nniqan Himoti hini sbiyaw o Rey-kung-hwo, thnganan dha nanaq seejiq o Kaadaadaan msa. Qnbhangan kari seuxal o saw bi tnthnganan klgan seejiq Pinuyumayan kisa, ini hari kla na dungus bi. Lutuc snruwan kari sbiyaw o niqan kingal nanaq puniq hmru hini keeman, eniq hini Ri-jun na seejiq o skluuy balay, iyux dha kingal nanaq na tqliwaq, kari klmukan ka tqliwaq nii o Rey-kung msa, kika tmhangan dha Rey-kung-hwo ka alang nii. Nniqan alang Nyusan Taytung Kwan-san ceng alang Himoti. Klbangan Gaga mniq Hwa-tung cung-ku na nan-twan ka Kwan-san ceng, hraan hidaw o sgasuc dha siyaw dgiyaq gsilung ni nsgan Tung-he, daya o lutuc nsgan C-san, gqiyan hidaw o dalih dhiyaq cung-yang na nsgan Hay-twan, hunac o kika nsgan Ru-yey kiya, thyaqan dha paru alang Taytung o saw hari 42km. Mniq hunac Pey-hwey-kwey-siyeyn, Je-tay-ci-fung ka karac, 24‚ĄÉ hari ka kngkwasan. Srnabaw o 23.6‚ĄÉ, rbagan o 37.5‚ĄÉ, krpuhan o 24.6‚ĄÉ, misan o 19.4‚ĄÉ, kingal idas siida o 18.9‚ĄÉ, empitu idas siida o 27.8‚ĄÉ, kingal hngkwasan o ini hari lglug ka un-tu karac dha, ini hari slexan ka S-ci dha uri. Kndkilan lnglingay Dowras. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung ‚óéPgriq rulu: Muda Tay9 siyeyn quri hunac>muda Kwan-san-ceng kung-swo pgriq igi>Hakaw paru Teyeyn-kwang>seng-taw 197siyeyn>Hakaw 17 >alang Himoti. Tnealang seejiq Seejiq Amis. Skari Kari Amis, Tlu ni kari Nihung. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Teyeyn-cu-cyaw, Taw-cyaw. Pnyahan alang ‚óéAlang Himoti na tnhjilan tnsapah na snslian kingal alang. Alang Himotin na Seejiq Amis o pusu bi "Hen-cun na Amis", lnglung ka nseejiq alang Himoti o nniqan Arapanay(gaga hunac yayung C-pen sayang) o kika pusu bi hruan Seejiq Amis kisa, bukuy do seasug kngkingal tnsapah siida kika tnhjil. Himoti na seejiq Amis o yasa ini knmalu ka eseisil seejiq, kiya ni lutuc thjil Hen-cun, hici do yasa niqan Klmukan tnhjilan ruwan Hen-cun duri, kiya ni ini kbaka ka na ka dxgal qnpahan dha, kiya ni knkingal tnsapah o miying ini ktna ka elug thjil dungan, dhuq sayang na alang Himoti. Niqan maspac tnsapah ka Himoti sayang: Ciwidian,Malulang,Pacidal,Pawtawan,Rarangs,Kakupa,Tarisakan,Sakayangay. Mniq saw Himoti na kngkingal sapah Amis hini o niqan kingal snluan qhuni Men-pay kana, matas hangan tnsapah, hangan kari Amis qbsuran sapah ni kari Tlu na qbsuran sapah, kika klaun dha balay. . ‚óé Paru ndaan alang Himoti: ‚Äß 1807ŚĻīRangawŚíĆFangas Kaadaadaan. ‚Äß 1850ŚĻīťõĽŚÖČśąźÁęčŚĻīťĹ°ÁĶĄÁĻĒKaput. ‚Äß 1866 . ‚ÄßHngkwasan 2002ŚĻīťõĽŚÖČ3ŤôüŚ†§ťė≤śĒĻŚĖĄ. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pusu pnhyugan: ‚óéCiway sapah pyasan Teyeyn-kwang 089-951142 Nyusan Tay-tung Kwan-san-ceng Teyen-kwang-ri Cung-sing 93. S.PHON: = ńßimoti = gaga mniq tajtuŇč kwansan ¶n ka alaŇč ńßimoti. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, pujuma*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. tńßijan alaŇč ńßaŇčan nniqan ńßimoti ńßini sbijaw o …ĺ…ô-kuŇč-ńßwo, tńßŇčanan dńßa nanaq s…ô…ô…üiq o kaadaadaan msa. qnbńßaŇčan ka…ĺi s…ôuxal o saw bi tntńßŇčanan klgan s…ô…ô…üiq pinujumajan kisa, ini ńßa…ĺi kla na duŇčus bi. lutu ¶ sn…ĺuwan ka…ĺi sbijaw o niqan kiŇčal nanaq puniq ńßm…ĺu ńßini k…ô…ôman, …ôniq ńßini …ĺi-…üun na s…ô…ô…üiq o skluuj balaj, ijux dńßa kiŇčal nanaq na tqliwaq, ka…ĺi klmukan ka tqliwaq nii o …ĺ…ô-kuŇč msa, kika tmńßaŇčan dńßa …ĺ…ô-kuŇč-ńßwo ka alaŇč nii. nniqan alaŇč njusan tajtuŇč kwan-san ¶…ôŇč alaŇč ńßimoti. klbaŇčan gaga mniq ńßwa-tuŇč ¶uŇč-ku na nan-twan ka kwan-san ¶…ôŇč, ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o sgasu ¶ dńßa sijaw dgijaq gsiluŇč ni nsgan tuŇč-ńß…ô, daja o lutu ¶ nsgan ¶-san, gqijan ńßidaw o dalińß dńßijaq ¶uŇč-jaŇč na nsgan ńßaj-twan, ńßuna ¶ o kika nsgan …ĺu-j…ô kija, tńßjaqan dńßa pa…ĺu alaŇč tajtuŇč o saw ńßa…ĺi **km. mniq ńßuna ¶ p…ô-ńßw…ô-kw…ô-sij…ôn, …ü…ô-taj- ¶i-*uŇč ka ka…ĺa ¶, *** ńßa…ĺi ka kŇčkwasan. s…ĺnabaw o **.**, …ĺbagan o **.**, k…ĺpuńßan o **.**, misan o **.**, kiŇčal idas siida o **.**, …ômpitu idas siida o **.**, kiŇčal ńßŇčkwasan o ini ńßa…ĺi lglug ka un-tu ka…ĺa ¶ dńßa, ini ńßa…ĺi sl…ôxan ka s- ¶i dńßa u…ĺi. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj dow…ĺas. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč *pg…ĺiq …ĺulu: muda taj* sij…ôn qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶>muda kwan-san- ¶…ôŇč kuŇč-swo pg…ĺiq igi>ńßakaw pa…ĺu t…ô…ôn-kwaŇč>s…ôŇč-taw ***sij…ôn>ńßakaw ** >alaŇč ńßimoti. tn…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq s…ô…ô…üiq amis. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi amis, tlu ni ka…ĺi nińßuŇč. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw t…ô…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw, taw- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč *alaŇč ńßimoti na tnńß…üilan tnsapańß na snslian kiŇčal alaŇč. alaŇč ńßimotin na s…ô…ô…üiq amis o pusu bi "ńß…ôn- ¶un na amis", lŇčluŇč ka ns…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč ńßimoti o nniqan a…ĺapanaj(gaga ńßuna ¶ jajuŇč ¶-p…ôn sajaŇč) o kika pusu bi ńß…ĺuan s…ô…ô…üiq amis kisa, bukuj do s…ôasug kŇčkiŇčal tnsapańß siida kika tnńß…üil. ńßimoti na s…ô…ô…üiq amis o jasa ini knmalu ka …ôs…ôisil s…ô…ô…üiq, kija ni lutu ¶ tńß…üil ńß…ôn- ¶un, ńßi ¶i do jasa niqan klmukan tnńß…üilan …ĺuwan ńß…ôn- ¶un du…ĺi, kija ni ini kbaka ka na ka dxgal qnpańßan dńßa, kija ni knkiŇčal tnsapańß o mijiŇč ini ktna ka …ôlug tńß…üil duŇčan, dńßuq sajaŇč na alaŇč ńßimoti. niqan maspa ¶ tnsapańß ka ńßimoti sajaŇč: ¶iwidian,malulaŇč,pa ¶idal,pawtawan,…ĺa…ĺaŇčs,kakupa,ta…ĺisakan,sakajaŇčaj. mniq saw ńßimoti na kŇčkiŇčal sapańß amis ńßini o niqan kiŇčal snluan qńßuni m…ôn-paj kana, matas ńßaŇčan tnsapańß, ńßaŇčan ka…ĺi amis qbsu…ĺan sapańß ni ka…ĺi tlu na qbsu…ĺan sapańß, kika klaun dńßa balaj. . * pa…ĺu ndaan alaŇč ńßimoti: * *****…ĺaŇčaw**aŇčas kaadaadaan. * *************kaput. * **** . *ńßŇčkwasan *************. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw pusu pnńßjugan: * ¶iwaj sapańß pjasan t…ô…ôn-kwaŇč ***-****** njusan taj-tuŇč kwan-san- ¶…ôŇč t…ô…ôn-kwaŇč-…ĺi ¶uŇč-siŇč **. nniqan saan …ĺmigaw *dgijaq ¶un- ¶j…ôn (tamina) *…ôlug *uŇč-sijun-taw *tu-…ĺow kńßilaŇč *san- ¶a-san ¶i-n…ô…ôn-p…ô ********** *t…ô…ôn-kwaŇč ńßwo-tuŇč- ¶uŇč-siŇč
